s: The official citizen app of the city of Offenbach am Main
d:
Discover Offenbach with the official city app - your gateway to everything the city has to offer!

The Offenbach App brings your city right to your smartphone and makes it easier than ever to stay connected with everything happening in Offenbach am Main. Whether you're a resident, visitor, or newcomer - this app is your essential companion for city life.

Key features:
• Digital citizen services
All municipal and citizen services in one place. Book appointments online, find important documents, and get help with administrative matters - all from your phone.
• City news and updates
Never miss important announcements, city updates, or local news. Get the latest information on what's happening in your neighborhood and across Offenbach.
• Discover events
Browse upcoming events, cultural activities, markets, and community events. Find something exciting every weekend with our comprehensive event calendar.
• Interactive city map
Explore Offenbach with our interactive map featuring points of interest, public facilities, and important locations. Get directions and discover hidden gems.
• Emergency information
Stay informed with NINA emergency alerts and access important emergency numbers and safety information.
• Local community
Connect with over 300 local clubs and organizations - from sports clubs to cultural groups.
• Report issues
Help keep your city clean and safe by reporting problems such as potholes or faulty street lights directly through the app.
• Works offline
Access important information even without an internet connection, including emergency numbers and waste collection schedules.
• Multilingual
Available in German, English, and Turkish for Offenbach's diverse community.

The Offenbach App makes digital city services your daily companion. Download now and experience a more connected Offenbach!
